name: ground-truth-mcp
description: Stop your AI from being wrong. Ground Truth lets AI agents verify claims, check live data, compare competitors, inspect APIs, and validate assumptions before acting. Free tier available. Also available as a Claude Code skill.
author: anish632

tools.name: check_endpoint
tools.description: Verify a URL or API endpoint exists. Returns status, auth requirements, response time, content type, and sample response.

tools.name: estimate_market
tools.description: Count packages in a space on npm or PyPI. Returns total count, top results with versions and scores.

tools.name: check_pricing
tools.description: Extract pricing from any webpage. Returns price points, plan names, free tier, and free trial availability.

tools.name: compare_competitors
tools.description: Compare 2-10 packages side-by-side with version, description, license, publish dates, and metadata.

tools.name: verify_claim
tools.description: Cross-reference a claim against live web sources. Returns per-source results and an overall verdict.

tools.name: test_hypothesis
tools.description: Run structured pass/fail tests against a hypothesis using live data. Returns per-test results and overall verdict.
